_about: Replay cassette of DataHub GMS OpenAPI v3 versioned-aspect responses (GET /openapi/v3/entity/dataset/{urn}/{aspect}?systemMetadata=true&version=N). It models the required v0-current + v1-historical sequence. The envelope is docs-verbatim; the ownership values and pipeline identities are synthetic planted-conflict data, not a live capture.

_provenance.shape_source: The systemMetadata envelope { value, systemMetadata: { properties, version, lastObserved, lastRunId, runId } } and the verbatim globalTags entry below are taken from the published DataHub OpenAPI guide (docs.datahub.com/docs/api/openapi/openapi-usage-guide). pipelineName is defined by DataHub's current SystemMetadata schema. This is REAL-SHAPE with SYNTHETIC ownership data, not a live capture.
_provenance.pending_real_capture: A capture from a running GMS on a cloud VM is USER-GATED (no live instance in CI). Replace the ownership/schema history entries below with a real captured batch when the demo VM is stood up; the docs-verbatim globalTags entry already anchors the envelope shape.

entries._note: VERBATIM from docs.datahub.com OpenAPI guide — anchors the { value, systemMetadata } envelope + the systemMetadata field names/types.
ownership current v0 — written by the stable dbt-prod pipeline in its July execution.
ownership historical v1 — displaced value written by the stable snowflake-prod pipeline in its June execution.
